title: Define v8.1 Provider Adapter Governance direction
description: Run the post-v8.0 runtime-backed direction review that selects the first bounded v8.1 implementation path for provider adapter records, adapter use checks, freshness evidence, approval policy gates, external-write escalation, Mission Control projection, and release-state integration.
triage_notes: Completed v8.1 Provider Adapter Governance direction, record/audit implementation, release-state gate, Mission Control projection, self-hosting adapter evidence, and focused regression tests.
